scripts.publish:lib: npm run build && cd dist/icons && npm publish
scripts.publish:icons:patch: cd projects/icons && npm version patch && cd ../.. && npm run build:icons && cd dist/icons && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:icons:minor: cd projects/icons && npm version minor && cd ../.. && npm run build:icons && cd dist/icons && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:icons:major: cd projects/icons && npm version major && cd ../.. && npm run build:icons && cd dist/icons && npm publish --access public
